definitions.meaning: [TRADUCIR AL PT: Primero / En primer lugar]
definitions.usage_example: First, open the box. Then, read the manual.
definitions.usage_example_es: [TRADUCIR AL PT: First, open the box. Then, read the manual.]
definitions.usage_context_en: [TRADUCIR AL PT: Usado para marcar el inicio de una secuencia o lista.]
definitions.usage_context_es: Used to mark the beginning of a sequence or list.

definitions.usage_example_es: [TRADUCIR AL PT: Next, add the sugar.]
definitions.usage_context_en: [TRADUCIR AL PT: Usado para indicar el paso siguiente al actual.]
definitions.usage_context_es: Used to indicate the step following the current one.

definitions.usage_example: We ate dinner, and after that, we watched a movie.
definitions.pronunciation_guide_es: [ADAPTAR PRONUNCIACIÓN DE after that AL PT]
definitions.usage_example_es: [TRADUCIR AL PT: We ate dinner, and after that, we watched a movie.]
definitions.usage_context_en: [TRADUCIR AL PT: Usado para introducir el siguiente evento en una secuencia.]
definitions.usage_context_es: Used to introduce the next event in a sequence.

definitions.usage_example_es: [TRADUCIR AL PT: Finally, close the box.]
definitions.usage_context_en: [TRADUCIR AL PT: Usado para introducir el último ítem en una lista o secuencia.]
definitions.usage_context_es: Used to introduce the last item in a list or sequence.

definitions.usage_example: First I work, then I rest.
definitions.usage_example_es: [TRADUCIR AL PT: First I work, then I rest.]
definitions.usage_context_en: [TRADUCIR AL PT: Usado para indicar lo que sucede a continuación en una secuencia.]
definitions.usage_context_es: Used to indicate what happens next in a sequence.

definitions.meaning: [TRADUCIR AL PT: Entonces / En ese caso]
definitions.usage_example: If you are hungry, then you should eat.
definitions.usage_example_es: [TRADUCIR AL PT: If you are hungry, then you should eat.]
definitions.usage_context_en: [TRADUCIR AL PT: Usado para indicar una consecuencia o resultado.]
definitions.usage_context_es: Used to state a consequence or result.

definitions.usage_example_es: [TRADUCIR AL PT: Call me when you arrive.]
definitions.usage_context_en: [TRADUCIR AL PT: Usado para introducir una cláusula de tiempo.]
definitions.usage_context_es: Used to introduce a clause of time.
